channel.title: Josiah-Bartlett on Wheeler Genealogy
channel.description: Recent content in Josiah-Bartlett on Wheeler Genealogy

item.title: The Warrant in Hand: Solomon Wheeler Arrests a Counterfeiter, April 1777
item.description: The Morgan Library document has arrived. Solomon Wheeler’s own handwriting — signed ‘Dep. Sher.’ — on a 1777 counterfeiting warrant signed by Josiah Bartlett and Meshech Weare is now in hand.
